claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Three research pillar WPs (WP2, WP3, WP4) ALL operate from months 1–36
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase4_gantt_milestones/gantt.json — critical_path and tasks arrays
claim_audit_results.flag_reason: Source contradicts claim: gantt.json shows WP3 tasks end at M30 (T3-01 M1–M12, T3-02 M6–M24, T3-03 M18–M30), not M36. WP2 (T2-03 ends M36) and WP4 (T4-03 ends M36) do run to M36, but WP3 ends at M30. The sweeping statement 'months 1–36' for all three pillar WPs is inconsistent with the Gantt source for WP3.

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: The consortium assembles 8 partners from 7 European countries
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/partners.json — partners array
claim_audit_results.flag_reason: Source contradicts the claim. partners.json lists 8 partners each from a distinct country: ATU (DE), CERIA (FR), BIIS (NL), ISIA (IT), NIHS (SE), ELI (CH), BAL (FI), FIIT (ES) — 8 different countries. The section's assertion of '7 European countries' is inconsistent with the Tier 3 partner data, which shows 8 countries.

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: All 8 partner full names, country codes, and WP lead assignments confirmed (ATU→WP1+WP2, CERIA→WP4, BIIS→WP3, ISIA→WP6, NIHS→WP5, ELI→WP7, FIIT→WP8, BAL→WP9)
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/partners.json (legal_name, country per partner) + docs/tier3_project_instantiation/consortium/roles.json (wp_lead per partner) + docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase3_wp_design/wp_structure.json (lead_partner per WP)

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Three governance bodies: General Assembly (biannual, all 8 partners), Project Management Committee (quarterly, all 8 partners), Ethics and Quality Oversight Committee (ATU and NIHS)
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase6_implementation_architecture/implementation_architecture.json — governance_matrix: General Assembly meeting_frequency='Biannual', composition all 8 partners; PMC meeting_frequency='Quarterly', composition all 8 partners; EQOC composition=[ATU, NIHS]

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Each partner holds a leadership role aligned to their core competency with non-overlapping responsibilities
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase6_implementation_architecture/implementation_architecture.json — management_roles: each of the 9 WP lead roles (MGR-WPL-WP1 through MGR-WPL-WP9) has exactly one assigned_to partner with distinct responsibilities; no two partners share a WP lead role. Inference chain: each management_roles entry assigns one partner as lead with non-overlapping WP scope → leadership is non-overlapping by design.
